untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires identification of ascending/descending triangle chart pattern with specific geometric constraints (lower left top, converging trendlines) and volume shape analysis (U-shaped, dome-shaped, random). These require candle-by-candle pattern recognition and trendline detection not available in the allowed indicator set. Market regime context (BULL vs BEAR) for volume trend optimization cannot be directly expressed in rule conditions. Volume trend direction and volume shape classification require structural pattern analysis beyond point-in-time indicator values.
translation_notes: Provided a basic breakout confirmation rule using heavy volume as a proxy for pattern reliability, but this does not capture the core pattern geometry, trendline convergence, or market-regime-dependent volume behavior described in the source material. A complete implementation would require a dedicated triangle pattern detector and market regime classifier.
